question: Explain why ΔS has a large positive value.
prompt: The reaction forms several _____ molecules from liquid and solid reactants. The number of particles with freedom of movement increases greatly, so disorder increases.
full_answer: The reaction forms several gaseous molecules from liquid and solid reactants. The number of particles with freedom of movement increases greatly, so disorder increases.

question: Explain why ΔS has a large positive value in a reaction that forms several gases.
prompt: The number of gaseous molecules _____. Gases have greater freedom of movement, so the disorder of the system increases significantly.
full_answer: The number of gaseous molecules increases. Gases have greater freedom of movement, so the disorder of the system increases significantly.
